recommendations.title: HALT/roll back the copilot-sdk-driver rollout for production workflows — 100% of sdk-path runs failing on auth pass-through
recommendations.detail: 06-03: all 3 sdk-driver runs failed 'Session was not created with authentication info or custom provider' (isAuthError, not retried), now on production main + a PR run. (1) Pin production copilot workflows back to the legacy copilot CLI path (0 failures) until fixed; (2) wire the connection token / custom provider into copilot_sdk_driver.cjs session init so the SDK session is created WITH auth (COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN currently all absent at session create); (3) add a pre-flight assertion that aborts the sdk path early with a clear message if no auth/provider is available, instead of an unhandled node rejection; (4) gate the rollout behind a smoke check that exercises a real prompt end-to-end.

recommendations.title: Make safe_outputs tolerate unresolvable target=* add_comment items (skip-and-warn) instead of red-failing the job
recommendations.detail: Contribution Check 06-03: create_issue landed but 3 add_comment target=* items without a PR number red-failed the whole job. Either (a) coach the agent to attach the PR number to add_comment when target=*, or (b) downgrade an unresolvable target=* comment to a warning so the job stays green when >=1 message lands.
